ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tents" (
  "tent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tent */,
  "tent_size" TEXT /* Size of the tent (e.g., 25.5m x 18m) */,
  "area_m2" REAL /* Area of the tent in square meters */,
  "sit_down_dinner_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the tent for sit-down dinner events */,
  "standing_cocktail_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the tent for standing/cocktail events */,
  "cinema_style_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the tent for cinema-style events */,
  "tent_type" TEXT /* Type of tent (e.g., standard, premium, luxury) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the tent (e.g., canvas, polyester) */,
  "setup_time_hours" REAL /* Time required to set up the tent (in hours) */,
  "price_per_day" REAL /* Rental price per day */,
  "weather_resistance" TEXT /* Level of weather resistance (e.g., wind, rain, snow) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client hosting the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., wedding, conference, party) */,
  "tent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tent assigned to the event */,
  "guest_count" INTEGER /* Number of guests attending the event */,
  "event_status" TEXT /* Status of the event (e.g., planned, in-progress, completed, canceled) */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget for the event */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the event */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the venue where the event is held */,
  "catering_id" INTEGER /* ID of the catering service */,
  "equipment_rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment rental service */,
  "client_satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Client satisfaction rating (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_catering_id FOREIGN KEY ("catering_id") REFERENCES catering_services ("catering_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_tent_id FOREIGN KEY ("tent_id") REFERENCES tents ("tent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_equipment_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_rental_id") REFERENCES equipment_rentals ("equipment_rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the client */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the client */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the client */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the client's company (if applicable) */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the primary contact person */,
  "preferred_contact_method" TEXT /* Preferred method of contact (e.g., email, phone, text) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the venue */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the venue */,
  "price_per_day" REAL /* Price per day for renting the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "catering_services" (
  "catering_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each catering service */,
  "catering_name" TEXT /* Name of the catering service */,
  "menu_options" TEXT /* Menu options available */,
  "price_per_head" REAL /* Price per head for catering */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("catering_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment_rentals" (
  "equipment_rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment rental service */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity available */,
  "price_per_day" REAL /* Price per day for renting the equipment */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact person */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, planner, client) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Activity name */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_schedules_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses incurred */,
  "client_satisfaction_rating" INTEGER /* Client satisfaction rating (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_metrics_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
